scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently "cd sme-creditmind-ai && npx next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000" "bash sme-creditmind-ai-backend/run-backend.sh"
scripts.dev:win: npx --yes concurrently "cd sme-creditmind-ai && npx next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000" "npm run dev:backend:win"
scripts.setup:backend: cd sme-creditmind-ai-backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:backend:win: cd sme-creditmind-ai-backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: npx --yes concurrently "cd sme-creditmind-ai && npx next start -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000" "bash sme-creditmind-ai-backend/run-backend.sh"
scripts.start:win: npx --yes concurrently "cd sme-creditmind-ai && npx next start -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000" "npm run dev:backend:win"
